_meta.description: Grant Engine support scope — defines which SOP files are exposed to each role tier

support_mode_descriptions.member_self_service: COMPANION uses sop.member.md only. No pipeline configuration references, no scoring criteria details, no internal workflow names.
support_mode_descriptions.staff_operational: COMPANION uses sop.member + sop.staff. May reference internal grant pipeline workflows and tools available to the staff role.
support_mode_descriptions.admin_full: COMPANION uses all three SOPs. May reference approved admin procedures including eligibility management and pipeline configuration.
support_mode_descriptions.executive_governance: COMPANION uses all SOPs with no restrictions. Full governance context including policy override authority available.
